sections.heading: Soffit Calculator | Area, Vent & Cost Estimate
sections.content: Use our soffit calculator to estimate soffit area, vents, fascia, panels & cost. Free tool for soffit replacement and roofing projects 2026. Calculate soffit panels, ventilation requirements, J-channel, and total project cost instantly.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the Soffit Calculator | Area, Vent & Cost Estimate do?
faq.answer: Use our soffit calculator to estimate soffit area, vents, fascia, panels & cost. Free tool for soffit replacement and roofing projects 2026. Calculate soffit panels, ventilation requirements, J-channel, and total project cost instantly.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
